bundles.title: Add AdapterFields and delete RunStateCoreFields
bundles.goal: Establish the generic adapter type constraint and remove the deprecated RunStateCoreFields alias from the type surface.

tasks.title: Add AdapterFields<TAdapter> conditional type to src/types/contracts.ts with doc comment explaining collision errors
Add RecordMutation type and TransitionOk<TAdapter> type to src/core/types.ts
Rewrite RunState<TAdapter> to use CoreRunState & AdapterFields<TAdapter>
Delete RunStateCoreFields from src/types/contracts.ts and remove from re-exports
Migrate all internal references from RunStateCoreFields to CoreRunState or RunState
Run bun run typecheck to confirm type changes compile

bundles.title: Refactor advanceRun to pure transition with record mutations
bundles.goal: Convert advanceRun from an I/O-performing command to a pure function that returns state and RecordMutation[] without touching any store.

tasks.title: Rewrite advanceRun signature to accept state, preconditions (priorRecords, nowIso, event) and return Result<TransitionOk<TAdapter>>
Replace InteractionRecordStore.write/list/delete calls with computed RecordMutation[] in return value
Remove deps.runs, deps.records, deps.changes from advanceRun's Deps type
Remove all WorkspaceContext and store imports from advance.ts
Run bun run typecheck to confirm advance.ts compiles

bundles.title: Refactor startChangeRun and startSyntheticRun to pure functions
bundles.goal: Convert start commands to accept precondition inputs and adapter seed, returning state without performing any I/O.

tasks.title: Rewrite startChangeRun signature to accept preconditions (nextRunId, proposalExists, existingRunExists, adapterSeed, nowIso) and return Result<TransitionOk<TAdapter>>
Rewrite startSyntheticRun signature with same pattern
Remove WorkspaceContext imports and calls (projectRoot, worktreePath, branchName, projectDisplayName, projectIdentity)
Remove deps.runs, deps.changes, deps.workspace from start Deps type
Run bun run typecheck to confirm start.ts compiles

bundles.title: Refactor suspend, resume, updateField and delete status/getField/helpers
bundles.goal: Convert remaining core commands to pure functions and remove read-only wrapper modules that belong in wiring.

tasks.title: Rewrite suspendRun to accept state and return Result<TransitionOk<TAdapter>> without store access
Rewrite resumeRun to accept state and return Result<TransitionOk<TAdapter>> without store access
Rewrite updateField to accept state and return Result<TransitionOk<TAdapter>> without store access
Delete src/core/status.ts
Delete src/core/get-field.ts
Delete src/core/_helpers.ts and migrate any needed logic inline
Remove all store and workspace imports from remaining core Deps types
Run bun run typecheck to confirm all core modules compile

bundles.title: Rewrite CLI wiring to gather-invoke-apply pattern
bundles.goal: Move all I/O into the CLI wiring layer following the three-phase gather/invoke/apply pattern for every subcommand.

tasks.title: Rewrite start subcommand: gather LocalRunState seed from WorkspaceContext + preconditions, invoke pure startChangeRun/startSyntheticRun, persist state
Rewrite advance subcommand: read state + records, invoke pure advanceRun, persist state then apply RecordMutation[] in order
Rewrite suspend subcommand: read state, invoke pure suspendRun, persist state
Rewrite resume subcommand: read state, invoke pure resumeRun, persist state
Rewrite update-field subcommand: read state, invoke pure updateField, persist state
Inline status subcommand: read run.json via store, write to stdout, exit
Inline get-field subcommand: read run.json, extract field, write to stdout or stderr on missing
Update specflow-prepare-change.ts if it calls any refactored core functions
Verify record-mutation ordering preserves existing compensation semantic (state write first, then record writes)
Run bun run typecheck to confirm wiring compiles

bundles.title: Migrate core and CLI tests to match pure function signatures
bundles.goal: Rewrite core tests to call pure functions with explicit state/preconditions and reduce CLI tests to smoke-level assertions.

tasks.title: Rewrite core advance tests to pass state + priorRecords and assert returned TransitionOk including recordMutations
Rewrite core start tests to pass preconditions and adapter seed, assert returned state
Rewrite core suspend/resume/updateField tests to pass state and assert returned TransitionOk
Add record-mutation compensation test: verify wiring-layer ordering matches prior best-effort cleanup behavior
Reduce CLI tests to smoke-level: argv → stdout/stderr/exit code assertions only
Remove any test mocks for stores or WorkspaceContext that are no longer needed in core tests
Run bun test to confirm all tests pass

bundles.title: Extend drift-guard test with static-grep and type-level assertions
bundles.goal: Add compile-time and grep-based assertions that prevent future re-introduction of I/O or adapter knowledge into src/core/.

tasks.title: Add static-grep assertions on src/core/**/*.ts for banned import strings (workspace-context, deps.runs.*, deps.changes.*, deps.records.*)
Add static-grep assertions for banned object-property-key tokens (repo_path, worktree_path, project_id, branch_name, last_summary_path, repo_name)
Add type-level assertion: every *Deps type in src/core/types.ts excludes workspace | runs | changes | records members
Add type-level assertion: AdapterFields<{ run_id: string }> resolves to never
Add type-level assertion: AdapterFields<LocalRunState> resolves to LocalRunState
Run bun test to confirm drift-guard test passes

bundles.title: Run full verification suite and confirm completion conditions
bundles.goal: Confirm all completion conditions from the design are met: typecheck, tests, openspec validate, grep checks, and CLI regression parity.

tasks.title: Run bun run format and fix any formatting issues
Run bun run typecheck and confirm green
Run bun test and confirm all tests pass
Run openspec validate split-runstate-into-core-workflow-state-and-local-adapter-state --type change and confirm green
Run grep -R 'RunStateCoreFields' src/ and confirm no results
Run grep -R 'workspace-context\|deps.runs\.\|deps.changes\.\|deps.records\.' src/core/ and confirm no results
Verify CLI regression parity: status, start, advance, suspend, resume, update-field, get-field produce identical output to pre-refactor baseline
